name: Gemini
description: Listen to Google Gemini's responses aloud with Voq's free Chrome extension.
metaDescription: Read Gemini AI responses aloud with Voq. Free text-to-speech Chrome extension — works on gemini.google.com.
steps: Install Voq for free from the Chrome Web Store.
Open Gemini at gemini.google.com and ask a question.
Once a response appears, select the text you want to listen to.
Click the Voq icon in the Chrome toolbar, or right-click the selection and pick 'Read with Voq'.
Voq's reading panel appears and reads the response aloud with word highlighting.
Adjust playback speed or voice from within the panel.
